title: Monitor Token Usage While Typing

findings.description: No token usage indicator visible near the chat input or status bar. The status bar shows model (Sonnet 4.6), mode (Normal), and branch (main) but no token count or usage meter.
findings.expected: A real-time token usage indicator near the input area showing token count as the user types.
findings.actual: No token usage indicator exists anywhere in the visible UI.

verdict: Feature not implemented. No token usage monitoring while typing.
